notes: Flashes a black screen and immediately closes. Tried all variations of Proton startup options with no success so far. Note that on the Steam Forums and RLL3 forums, it seems that a lot of Windows users have (from time to time) the same problem with it refusing to start.
title: Rugby League Live 3

notes: Since Proton 4.11-7, runs perfectly without any tweaks. Controller is required for game and a wired XBox 360 Controller works fine. Played a few seasons in Career Mode without any problems.
title: Rugby League Live 3
